assign_grant_serial_desc: Select a grant call and serial to assign this project for funding.

explainers.new: Initial vetting: review new F1 submissions before requesting changes or approving.
explainers.feedback: Projects needing changes: review responses and approve or request further edits.
explainers.declined: Declined submissions: archived for record; no further action required.
explainers.staging: Stage approved projects to preview budget impact in the By State view above. Selected projects can then be moved to F2 Uncommitted List where grant allocation will occur.

kpis.plan_desc: Sum of planned budgets from F1 planned activities
kpis.actuals_desc: Sum of recorded expenses from F4 reports
kpis.variance_desc: Plan minus Actuals for the current view

counters.pct_tracker_desc: Average of F4 (actual vs plan) and F5 (at least one report) per project
counters.projects_desc: Committed projects (approved/active) in the current view
counters.with_mous_desc: Projects linked to an F3 MOU
counters.with_f4s_desc: Projects that have at least one F4 report
counters.with_f5s_desc: Projects that have at least one F5 program report
counters.f5_complete_desc: Share of projects with at least one F5
counters.total_individuals_desc: Total individuals reached through F5 program reports
counters.total_families_desc: Total families reached through F5 program reports

table.title: All Active Projects
table.f5_complete_tooltip: Share of projects with at least one F5
table.pct_tracker_tooltip: Per project: 50% from F4 (actual/plan, capped at 100%) plus 50% if at least one F5. Shown as average across projects.
table.overdue_tooltip: State/ERR: count of projects overdue (transfer + 32 days passed, F4 and F5 not both complete). Project: days overdue.

tips.state: Tip: Click a state to drill into its ERR rooms.
tips.room: Tip: Click an ERR to drill into its projects.
tips.project: Tip: Click a project row or the View button to open details.

detail_modal.title: Project Detail
detail_modal.overdue_calc: Due date = Transfer date + 32 days. Project is overdue until both F4 and F5 reports are complete.
detail_modal.overdue_calc_formula: Transfer date: {{transferDate}} → Due date: {{dueDate}}. This project is {{days}} days overdue.

management_explainer_intro: Plan, actuals, and F4/F5 progress for committed projects—portal rows and legacy imports—organized by state, ERR, and project.
management_explainer_metrics_scope: Important: Plan, Actuals, Variance, and the Individuals/Families headline figures use totals for the full dataset from the server. Filters apply to the project list and to the second row of KPI cards (Projects, MOUs, F4/F5 coverage, tracker).
management_explainer_metrics_kpi_bullets: Plan — Sum of planned budgets (from F1-style planned activities or structured expenses on each project).
Actuals — Sum of recorded spend from F4 financial summaries.
Variance — Plan minus actuals (surplus budget if positive).
Projects — Count of projects in your current filtered slice.
With MOUs — How many of those projects have an MOU link.
With F4s / With F5s — How many projects have at least one F4 or F5 report in the rollup.
% F4 Complete (card) — Overall utilization for the filtered slice: total actuals divided by total plan (not “percent of projects”).
% F5 Complete (card) — Share of filtered projects that have at least one F5 report.
% Tracker (card) — Average of the per-project tracker score across the filtered projects (see the % Tracker subsection below).
Total Individuals / Total Families — Reach from F5 beneficiary data, plus historical target columns where imported.
management_explainer_metrics_table_bulle: Plan / Actuals / Variance — Same meanings as the cards, but for the row: state aggregate, ERR aggregate, or one project. Variance is plan minus actual.
Individuals — Intended or reported individuals for that row (targets from imports; F5 reach totals for portal projects where applicable).
Overdue — What this column shows (and how it is calculated) is spelled out in the Overdue subsection right below.
F4s — Number of F4 reports counted in the rollup; at project level you may see a status label (Waiting / Partial / In review / Completed) instead of only a count.
% F4 — Spend utilization for that row: actual divided by plan. Some historical rows show 100% when the import marks F4 complete.
F5s — Number of F5 program reports; at project level a status label may appear.
% F5 — For aggregated rows: share of projects under that state/ERR with at least one F5. For a single project: 100% if there is an F5, otherwise 0%.
% Tracker — Short label; details are in the % Tracker subsection below.
management_explainer_metrics_tracker_bul: Each project gets a 0–100% score blending F4 (spend vs plan + status) and F5 (status and at least one report where that applies).
State, ERR, and grant rows show the average of those scores for projects in that row. The top % Tracker KPI does the same for your current filters.
management_explainer_metrics_overdue_bul: Due date = transfer date + 32 days (transfer from MOU payment or legacy import). Past that date you count as overdue until both F4 and F5 are far enough along: completed, partial, or in review.
Aggregated rows: Overdue is a count. Project rows: days overdue (or legacy imported text). Summary by Grant: same rule, count per grant.
management_explainer_metrics_grant_bulle: One row per grant call (plus Unassigned for projects not on a grant row).
Plan, Actuals, Variance, Utilization (burn) — Rolled up across all projects matched to that grant (or donor match for legacy rows).
Overdue — Uses the same overdue definition as above; shows how many overdue projects fall in that grant bucket.
F4s / F5s — Total report counts in that bucket.
% F4 / % F5 — Share of projects in that grant that have at least one F4 or F5 report.
% Tracker — Same idea as above: average tracker score for projects in that grant row.
management_explainer_data_lead: The first load asks the server for a consolidated rollup. That merges:
management_explainer_data_bullets: Portal projects with committed or allocated funding (approved, active, pending, or completed). If your account is limited to certain states, only those states appear.
Legacy activity imported from older spreadsheets, joined to financial actuals and F4 summaries where the data model allows.
Plan totals from planned activities or structured expenses—portal-sourced projects prefer the expense table.
Actual spend from F4 summaries; F5 counts and last report dates from program reports; reach numbers from F5 beneficiary rows when present.
MOU payment records supply transfer dates used for overdue calculations.
A follow-up pass loads F4 and F5 report lists to count portal uploads per project for the table.
management_explainer_ui_bullets: Summary by Grant sits below the main grid; it is described under Metrics.
Main grid: start at state level, click a state → ERR rooms → projects; use Back to move up. Grant-serial filter can skip straight to project rows.
Filters include historical vs new (from 2026 onward), grant, F4/F5 status, state, date range, grant segment, and sector expense category.
Refresh reloads everything; wide tables scroll sideways.
management_explainer_actions_bullets: Open a project row: detail modal with objectives, financial rollups, and F4 report lines.
Upload or open F4/F5 from a row when your role allows (same modals as the reporting pages).
Change F4/F5 reporting status on the row when permitted; mark a project completed when permitted.
Export CSV for the rows currently shown.
Overdue follows the same rule as elsewhere: due window after transfer until both F4 and F5 are far enough along.
